title: Redesign BentoRegistry
task: Redesign the BentoRegistry landing section per user direction: keep the asymmetric bento grid (not a flat row), add a copyable install command to every card, and make previews autoplay+loop instead of hover-to-play.

stories.title: Previews autoplay and loop (remove hover-to-play)
acceptanceCriteria: Each Remotion <Player> renders with autoPlay and loop enabled so previews play automatically on mount, not on hover
The hover handlers that play/pause the player (handleEnter/handleLeave gating playback) are removed
No regression: spotlight cursor overlay and the whileHover lift may remain (only hover-to-PLAY behavior is removed)

stories.title: Install command on every card
acceptanceCriteria: Every BentoCard footer shows a compact, copyable install command of the form 'npx shadcn@latest add remocn/<name>' derived from the card's registry name
Clicking the command copies it to the clipboard with visible copied feedback (Check icon)
Copy interaction fires a trackEvent analytics call consistent with existing surface conventions
Command text uses a mono font and truncates gracefully inside the card

stories.title: Bento grid layout preserved and polished
acceptanceCriteria: Layout remains an asymmetric bento grid (featured large card + smaller cards across two grid rows), NOT a single flat row
All 5 existing components remain present with their titles/descriptions
Card footer accommodates title + description + install command without visual overflow at sm and md breakpoints
lsp_diagnostics reports 0 errors on the edited file
